title: The Delhi (Urban Areas) Tenants Relief Act, 1961
full_text: The Delhi (Urban Areas) Tenants Relief Act, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196130 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1961-08-28 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Delhi (Urban Areas) Tenants Relief Act, 1961 Long Title: An Act to provide relief to the tenants of land in the urban areas of the Union territory of Delhi. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 28-08-1961 Notification: Chief Commissioners Notification TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Delhi (Urban Areas) Tenants Relief Act, 1961 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Grounds of ejectment of tenant. Section 4. Abatement of proceedings. Section 5. Restoration of land to tenant in certain cases. Section 6. Rent. Section 7. Act to override contracts, etc. Section 8. Power to make rules. Section 9. Repeal.
